query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value, p.priority, p.suppressed, p.discoveryStatus, p.lifecycleStatus,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sr_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as nu_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Olympic Dam%' OR p.name LIKE '%Olympic%'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value, p.priority, p.suppressed, p.discoveryStatus, p.lifecycleStatus;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value, p.priority, p.suppressed, p.discoveryStatus, p.lifecycleStatus,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sr_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as nu_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Olympic Dam%' OR p.name LIKE '%Olympic%'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value, p.priority, p.suppressed, p.discoveryStatus, p.lifecycleStatus;
